response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile, hands-on full-stack engineer with roughly 15 years of experience and recent exposure to AI-agent tooling (MCP generators, agentic workflows). However, this is a Principal/Director-level AI-strategy role requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products or platforms at scale, cloud strategy advisory, and the gravitas to inspire and advise strategic customers. The resume reflects strong individual-contributor craftsmanship at senior/staff level, but lacks director-level scope, deep cloud-platform strategy, and recognized AI thought leadership. The seniority and AI-strategy gap is substantial.
strengths: Broad ~15-year engineering background across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic workflows)
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, open-source platform founder, frequent speaker/teacher
concerns: No director-level or principal IC leadership experience to match the role's scope
Lacks recognized AI expertise or demonstrated AI products/platforms built at scale
Limited cloud-platform strategy and customer/partner advisory experience

key_factors.factor: No demonstrated AI products/platforms or recognized AI expertise
